Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainReviewResult

Packages that use OpenDrainReviewResult
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain
Open-drain review support using normalized STID/P&ID and optional tagreader evidence.

  • Uses of OpenDrainReviewResult in neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

    OpenDrainReviewReport.addResult(OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Adds a per-item review result.

    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkBackpressureAndBackflow(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks backpressure and backflow prevention.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkBunding(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks bunding around flammable liquid tanks and vessels.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkCapacity(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result, double defaultLiquidLeakRateKgPerS)
    Checks open-drain capacity for fire water and process-fire leak load.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkDesignStandardEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks documented design standards.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkDrainSeparation(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks separation between closed/open drains and hazardous/non-hazardous drains.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkDrillingProductionSeparation(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks separation between drilling and production open-drain systems.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkFireDivisionIntegrity(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks fire-division integrity around drain boxes and drain piping.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkFloaterSpreading(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks spreading controls for floating facilities.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkHazardousDrainTank(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks hazardous-area collection tank purge or inerting.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkHelideckDrainage(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks helideck dedicated drain requirement.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkOperationalEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks optional tagreader or historian evidence.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkSealsAndVentRouting(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks liquid/fire seals and vent routing.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkSpillCollection(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks that flammable or hazardous liquid spills are collected and drained.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkTemporaryStorageDrainage(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks tote-tank and temporary flammable liquid storage drainage.
    private void
    OpenDrainReviewEngine.checkUtilityIndependence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks that open-drain function is not utility dependent.
